programme.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programme.desc: A pleasant American jumps the gun when he decides to go on a quick day-trip a cheerful traveller's trip is in the bag a baggage search turns cheesy a traveller's odd luggage needs to go through the proper channels.

programme.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programme.desc: An untruthful traveler is missing two bags a favor may land an American in hot water mail center officers uncover a narcotic scheme a traveler's visa is revealing a student learns a lesson a producer's luggage could be showstopper.

programme.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programme.desc: Trouble looms for a young Asian woman carrying someone else's bag, and a pair of Canadians return from a concert in California with more than a T-shirt.

programme.title: Customs
programme.desc: An angry man causes some excitement at Birmingham airport.

programme.title: Customs
programme.desc: A man stopped in Dover gets nervous as his car's searched a group in Birmingham with lots of cash are caught being economical with the truth one man's Ibiza trip sets alarm bells ringing.

programme.title: Customs
programme.desc: A grandmother loses her cool after a suspect package is found in her laptop officers in Birmingham stub out a couple's plan to make a quick buck high traces of cocaine are found in Gatwick.

programme.title: Customs
programme.desc: A full body scan at Gatwick Airport reveals one man's suspicious excuses are difficult to believe on a flight from Spain, a couple bring back more than a sun tan a quick fire questioning proves to be the downfall of a hapless smuggler.

programme.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programme.desc: A pleasant American jumps the gun when he decides to go on a quick day-trip a cheerful traveller's trip is in the bag a baggage search turns cheesy a traveller's odd luggage needs to go through the proper channels.

programme.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programme.desc: An untruthful traveler is missing two bags a favor may land an American in hot water mail center officers uncover a narcotic scheme a traveler's visa is revealing a student learns a lesson a producer's luggage could be showstopper.

programme.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programme.desc: Trouble looms for a young Asian woman carrying someone else's bag, and a pair of Canadians return from a concert in California with more than a T-shirt.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Defying posted warnings, a snowboarder ventures into high-risk avalanche territory-and pays the price the SAR team faces a race against weather and terrain to extract him safely.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: When a mountain biker crashes on a remote trail, the SAR team scrambles into action with limited light and difficult access.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Avalanche risk turns deadly after a skier is caught in unstable snow the SAR team must use helicopters and controlled detonations to prevent further slides before attempting the rescue.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: When three calls come in within hours, Teton County Search and Rescue faces its toughest day yet a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and a looming avalanche all demand immediate response.
